items.example: The weather was beautiful on our holiday.
The traffic was terrible this morning.
The food at the restaurant was delicious.
The lecture was so boring that I fell asleep.
The football match was very exciting.
She was nervous before the exam.
Her parents were proud of her results.
We were surprised by the news.
He was upset when he heard the bad news.
I was exhausted after the long trip.
The market was very crowded on Sunday.
The restaurant was empty when we arrived.
The street was too noisy to sleep.
The library was quiet and peaceful.
We weren't ready when they arrived.
She was late for the meeting this morning.
He was early and had to wait for everyone.
She was alone at home all evening.
We were all together for the celebration.
The food was great but the service was slow.
The weather was cold and rainy last weekend.
The journey was long but comfortable.
Her parents were proud of her exam results.
The hotel room was very comfortable.
He wasn't available yesterday afternoon.
